General.Name: Century Entertainment International Holdings Ltd
General.Description: Century Entertainment International Holdings Limited, together with its subsidiaries, engages in gaming businesses in Cambodia. It operates through two segments, Gaming and Entertainment Businesses; and Augmented Reality (AR)/Virtual Reality (VR) and Mobile Games Solutions. The company engages in the mobile game apps and gaming table businesses. It also develops AR/VR applications for its clients. The company was formerly known as Amax International Holdings Limited and changed its name to Century Entertainment International Holdings Limited in December 2019. Century Entertainment International Holdings Limited was incorporated in 1997 and is headquartered in Hung Hom, Hong Kong.
General.Address: Metropolis Tower, Hung Hom, Hong Kong
